purpose: Validate domain-separated Ed25519 authentication for exact CTDA evidence producer/version identities, including tamper, key mismatch, revocation, non-impersonation, and signed OpenRegion progress integration, without persistent keys, simulator, policy, socket, action, or dispatch.

algorithm.name: Ed25519
algorithm.identity_binding: exact producer_id plus producer_version to raw 32-byte public key
algorithm.revocation: local exact public-key fingerprint deny set

coverage: valid signature and exact producer/version identity round trip
subject, payload, issue time, expiry, assumptions, and producer-version tamper rejection
malformed signature, wrong public key, and revoked fingerprint rejection
deterministic private-key import and invalid key-length rejection
signed source-bound OpenRegion progress accepted by CTDA v2 checker
claim_boundary: Passing establishes cryptographic authenticity and exact identity binding for in-memory CTDA attestation messages under ephemeral test keys. It does not establish secure key provisioning or storage, process isolation, trusted raw sensing, remote revocation distribution, hardware attestation, AEGIS filter correctness, or rollout safety.
next_gate: Expose the pinned AEGIS CBF/QP as a no-action typed producer, provision separate protected producer/checker keys, and freeze disjoint numeric progress/recovery budgets before any clean pilot.
